# USS Academy — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for AI crawlers and language models

## Organization
name: USS Academy
legal_name: USS Academy LLC
type: Firearms Training Academy
founded: 1999
headquarters: Central Florida (mobile — travels to client locations and partner ranges)
phone: 1-800-508-8772
phone_local: 407-305-8335
email: support@ussacademy.org
website: https://www.ussacademy.org
hours: By appointment — classes scheduled 7 days/week

## About
USS Academy is a firearms training academy based in Central Florida with 27+ years of experience and 29,000+ students trained. We offer concealed weapons permit (CWP) classes, firearms safety courses, competitive shooting programs, instructor certification, and private training sessions. All instructors are law enforcement, military, or NRA/USCCA certified with active Florida K License credentials.

## Class Types & Pricing

### Tier 1 — Beginner & Core Safety ($99–$179)
- Florida Concealed Weapons Permit (CWP) Class
- First Time Shooter Safety Course
- Basic Pistol Fundamentals
- Home Defense Basics
- Women's Firearms Safety
- Senior Firearms Safety
- Youth Introduction to Firearms Safety

### Tier 2 — Skill Building & Development ($279)
- Intermediate Pistol Skills
- Draw & Fire Techniques
- Low Light / Flashlight Shooting
- Defensive Shooting Scenarios

### Tier 3 — Tactical & Professional ($349)
- Advanced Tactical Pistol
- Black Box Stress Inoculation
- Rifle / Carbine Fundamentals
- Active Shooter Response
- Close Quarters Combat
- Vehicle Defense Tactics
- Multi-Threat Engagement

### Tier 4 — Precision & Science ($399)
- Science of the Shot
- Zero to Accurate (Precision Marksmanship)

### Tier 5 — Night Vision ($499)
- Night Vision Tactical Course

### Tier 6 — Professional Development ($799+)
- Instructor Certification & Mentorship Program

### Additional Services
- Ask Your Instructor Q&A Call ($75)
- Bullseye Benefactor Subscription ($100/month — 2 range sessions/month)
- Private 1-on-1 Training (custom pricing)
- Group Classes at Your Location (Host-a-Class program)
- Competitive Shooting Programs (USPSA, IDPA, Steel Challenge)

## Credentials
- 29,000+ students trained
- 27+ years in operation (founded 1999)
- Law enforcement and USMC veteran instructors
- NRA Certified Instructors
- USCCA Certified Instructors
- Florida K License holders
- Background-checked, drug-tested staff

## Waivers & Registration
- Class Registration: https://www.ussacademy.org/waiver-class-registration
- CWP Exam Registration: https://www.ussacademy.org/waiver-exam-registration
- Range Waiver: https://www.ussacademy.org/waiver-range

## Service Areas
- Orlando, FL
- Central Florida (all counties)
- Tampa Bay, FL
- Jacksonville / Northeast FL
- Miami / South FL
- Space Coast / Melbourne, FL
- Pensacola / Northwest FL
- All of Florida (mobile — we travel to your location)

## Key Facts
- 29,000+ students trained since 1999
- Classes available 7 days/week by appointment
- Mobile academy — classes at partner ranges and client locations statewide
- CWP classes include live fire qualification
- Certificate issued same day for completed courses
- Groupon partner (discounted CWP classes available)
- WaiverForever integrated digital waivers

- Email: support@ussacademy.org
- Website booking: https://www.ussacademy.org/#classes
- Agent: JASON (USS Academy AI Agent — handles CWP inquiries, class scheduling, certificate tracking)
